message: `npm run lint:json` fails with MODULE_NOT_FOUND: package.json declares a `lint:json` script (`node scripts/lint-json.js`) but scripts/lint-json.js does not exist anywhere in the repo. Verified pre-existing at base commit d059b43faf24e64eb7a560cc37cebd5ae30fe17b via `git ls-tree -r d059b43... --name-only` (no scripts/ directory at base) -- not introduced by this run's diff (bin/cli.js, tests/cli.test.js).
fix_hint: Either add scripts/lint-json.js implementing the JSON lint step, or remove the lint:json script from package.json until an implementation exists. Out of this run's authorized_surface (bin/cli.js, tests/cli.test.js) -- file as a follow-up, do not fix inline.
